allow: Bash(cp "Fotos/Design system completo/assets/logo-horizontal.png" "Fotos/Design system completo/assets/logo-horizontal-transparente.png" "Fotos/Design system completo/assets/logo-simbolo.png" "Fotos/Design system completo/assets/logo-simbolo-transparente.png" public/images/logos/)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false; Write-Output "killed PID $_" } } else { Write-Output "port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false } ; Write-Output "restarted" } else { Write-Output "port free" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false } }; Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "start" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Site - Fava e Vitorino" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/sobre" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15\).StatusCode)
